pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage with quick access to key school information and tools for families. Includes announcements, highlights, and prominent links into all major tools (activities, lunch, transportation, calendar, etc.).
primary_functions: Provide high-level overview of school announcements and highlights
Offer clear navigation links to Activities, Families, Academics, Programs, Transportation, Calendar, and About sections
Surface quick links to common tools such as lunch menu, bus routes, and upcoming events

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Activities" tile or CTA in homepage content
Click "Lunch Menu" quick tool link
Click a transportation quick link pre-filtered for a common street
Click "View full calendar" under upcoming events
Click "Staff Directory" link in an About section teaser
Click a homework policies callout card for a specific grade
Click "View supply list" card for a specific grade
Click a homepage promo for July summer camps

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled "Home"
Users can land directly on the homepage via the root site URL

pages.name: After-School Programs
pages.description: Listing and discovery page for after-school activities and clubs. Parents can search, filter, and favorite programs such as math, science, arts, and sports.
primary_functions: Filter programs by grade level (e.g., 4th Grade), subject/category (e.g., Math & Science), fees, and start/end times
Sort programs by start time, day of week, or cost to find convenient options
View key program details (description, schedule, cost, grade eligibility) on program cards
Save or favorite individual programs (e.g., math club) directly from the program card

incoming_params.description: Optional grade level to pre-select in filters, e.g., "fourth_grade"
Optional category to pre-select, e.g., "math_science"
Optional maximum monthly fee to apply, e.g., 40
Optional cutoff end time filter, e.g., "4:30 PM"
Optional sort key, e.g., "start_time_asc"

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Activities" goes to this page
Footer link labeled "After-School Programs"
Linked from homepage activities promos or other internal content

pages.name: Lunch Menu
pages.description: Weekly school lunch menus with dietary filters for families. Parents can choose a week, filter for vegetarian or nut-free items, and add entrées into the meal planner.
primary_functions: Select a specific week (e.g., Week of March 9) to view the lunch menu
Apply dietary filters such as Vegetarian and Nut-Free to the displayed menu items
Browse daily menus (Monday–Friday) and see filtered entr�e9e and side options
Add selected entr�e9e items to the Meal Planner for specific days

incoming_params.description: Optional MenuWeek.id to pre-select a specific week, e.g., the week of March 9

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click contextual "Open this week in My Meal Planner" button
Click a "View School Supply Lists" link in the Families section of the page

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Families" points to this Lunch Menu page
Footer link labeled "Lunch Menu"
Linked from homepage quick tools for families

pages.name: Meal Planner
pages.description: Weekly planner showing a student’s planned school lunches. Displays items added from the Lunch Menu and allows adjustments for each day.
primary_functions: Display planned lunches for a selected week, organized by day
Show vegetarian, nut-free, or other filtered selections added from the Lunch Menu
Allow users to remove or adjust planned items for each day
Provide navigation back to the Lunch Menu to add more meals

incoming_params.description: Optional MenuWeek.id whose meal plan should be shown by default

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Lunch Menu" link for the same week

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "My Meal Planner"
Direct access via a URL containing a menuWeekId query parameter
Linked from Lunch Menu after adding items

pages.name: Bus Routes & Times
pages.description: Searchable list of school bus routes and schedules. Families can search by street, apply grade and arrival filters, and sort routes.
primary_functions: Search bus routes by street name (e.g., Oak Street)
Filter routes by grade range (e.g., K–5 Elementary) and arrival time windows (e.g., arrives before 7:45 AM)
Sort results by arrival time (earliest first) or route number
Open a specific route’s detail page to see full stop and time information

incoming_params.description: Optional street name search query, e.g., "Oak Street"
Optional grade range filter, e.g., "k_5_elementary"
Optional arrival time window identifier, e.g., "before_7_45_am"
Optional sort key such as "arrival_time_asc"

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a bus route in the search results list

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Transportation"
Footer link labeled "Bus Routes & Transportation"
URL parameters can pre-populate the search form

pages.name: Bus Route Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a specific bus route. Shows all stops, times, and grade eligibility, with the option to save the route.
primary_functions: Display full stop list, pick-up and drop-off times, and applicable grades for the route
Highlight key times such as arrival at school to confirm it meets time constraints
Allow the user to save the route to their personal "My Routes" list
Provide a link back to the main Bus Routes & Times search results

incoming_params.description: BusRoute.id identifying which route’s details to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Bus Routes & Times" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via a route link containing ?busRouteId=...
Opened from My Routes list entries

pages.name: My Routes
pages.description: Personal list of saved bus routes for quick reference. Families can review, open, or remove any saved routes.
primary_functions: List all bus routes the user has saved from route detail pages
Show key route details (route name/number, primary stops, arrival time) in a compact format
Allow users to remove routes from their saved list
Link to each route’s detail page for full information

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved route to open its detail page

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "My Routes"
Linked from confirmation messages after saving a route

pages.name: School Calendar
pages.description: School-wide calendar of events with filtering options. Parents can view events by month, audience, and time of day.
primary_functions: Switch between months (e.g., select April) to view events for that period
Filter events by audience (e.g., 1st Grade Families) and by time of day or start time window (e.g., 5:00–8:00 PM)
Display a list or agenda view of matching events alongside the calendar
Open event detail pages in the same or new browser tabs

incoming_params.description: Month number (1–12) to display initially, e.g., 4 for April
Year to display initially, e.g., 2025
Optional audience filter value such as "first_grade_families"
Optional time-of-day range identifier, e.g., "evening_5_8_pm"

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click or open an event title from the calendar event list

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Calendar"
Footer link labeled "School Calendar"
URL parameters can pre-select month and filters

pages.name: Event Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a specific school event. Shows full details and allows families to save events for quick access.
primary_functions: Show full event details such as title, date, time, location, audience, and description
Indicate grade-level relevance (e.g., 1st Grade Families) and any special instructions
Allow users to save the event to their personal "My Events" list
Provide navigation back to the main calendar or filtered event list

incoming_params.description: Event.id identifying which event to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Calendar" link

access_methods.description: Accessed from calendar or My Events via ?eventId=...

pages.name: My Events
pages.description: Personal list of saved school events for families. Summarizes upcoming events the family has chosen to save.
primary_functions: Display all events the user has saved, with dates and times summarized
Allow users to remove events from their saved list
Provide quick links to each event’s detail page
Let users view events in a simple list or grouped by week/month

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a saved event title
Click "View in Calendar" from a saved event

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "My Events"

pages.name: Staff Directory
pages.description: Searchable directory of school staff members. Parents can find teachers by grade and subject.
primary_functions: Filter staff by grade (e.g., 3rd Grade) and subject/role (e.g., Math)
Sort staff results by criteria such as years of experience (most to least)
Display a list of matching staff with basic info (name, role, grade, subject)
Open individual teacher profile pages for more detailed information and contact options

incoming_params.description: Optional grade level filter such as "third_grade"
Optional subject filter such as "math"
Optional sort key such as "experience_desc"

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a staff member’s name or photo

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "About" points to this directory
Footer link labeled "About & Staff Directory"

pages.name: Teacher Profile
pages.description: Profile and contact page for an individual teacher. Shows biography, teaching details, and a secure contact form for parents.
primary_functions: Show detailed information about the teacher (bio, years of experience, subjects, grades, contact preferences)
Provide a contact form to send a message to the teacher (including parent/guardian name, student name, email, and message)
Submit parent questions (e.g., about math homework expectations) directly to the teacher
Offer navigation back to the Staff Directory or to other related staff profiles

incoming_params.description: StaffMember.id identifying which teacher profile to load

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Staff Directory" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via a staff member link containing ?staffMemberId=...
Message form submission is handled on this page using sendTeacherMessage

pages.name: Homework & Grading Policies
pages.description: Reference page for homework and grading policies by grade level. Includes a table of contents for sections such as homework time guidelines and grading scales.
primary_functions: Filter policies by grade level (e.g., 2nd Grade) to show relevant guidelines
Navigate within the page via a section/table-of-contents sidebar (e.g., Homework Time Guidelines)
Display detailed homework time expectations, including nightly time limits such as a 30-minute cap
Allow users to bookmark specific sections (e.g., 2nd-grade homework time guidelines) to their personal bookmarks

incoming_params.description: Optional grade level, e.g., "second_grade", to show policies for that grade
Optional section key such as "homework_time_guidelines" to scroll to on load
Optional anchor id corresponding to a specific PolicySection

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View all bookmarks" from a bookmark confirmation message

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Academics"
Footer link labeled "Homework & Grading Policies"
URL parameters can pre-select grade and scroll to a section

pages.name: My Bookmarks
pages.description: Personal list of bookmarked policy sections and reference content. Bookmarks provide one-click access back to specific sections of the policies page.
primary_functions: List all sections the user has bookmarked from pages like Homework & Grading Policies
Show the title and brief description of each bookmarked section (e.g., 2nd Grade Homework Time Guidelines)
Allow users to open the original page scrolled to the bookmarked section
Provide options to remove bookmarks from the list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a bookmarked policy entry

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "My Bookmarks"

pages.name: School Supply Lists
pages.description: Grade-specific school supply lists for families. Shows required and optional items and lets parents send items into a checklist.
primary_functions: Select a grade level (e.g., 2nd Grade) to view the appropriate supply list
Toggle to show only optional items (Optional Items Only) or all items
Sort items by estimated cost (low to high) to find affordable options
Add selected supplies to the user’s personal supply checklist

incoming_params.description: Optional grade level such as "second_grade" to pre-select the list
If true, show only optional items initially
Optional sort key such as "estimated_cost_asc"

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View My Supply Checklist" button on the list page

access_methods.description: Footer link labeled "School Supply Lists"
Linked from Lunch Menu and other Families-focused content

pages.name: My Supply Checklist
pages.description: Personal checklist of selected school supplies. Families can see what they’ve added, mark items as purchased, and remove items as needed.
primary_functions: Display all items the user has added from the School Supply Lists, grouped by grade if needed
Show item names, estimated costs, and optional/required status
Allow users to check off items as purchased or remove them from the list
Provide navigation back to the School Supply Lists to add more items

incoming_params.description: Optional grade level to focus the checklist view, e.g., "second_grade"

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Add more items" from a specific grade section

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "My Supply Checklist"
URL can carry a gradeLevel parameter to focus the view

pages.name: Summer Camps
pages.description: Listing and search page for summer camp sessions offered by the school. Families can filter by month, hours, and cost.
primary_functions: Filter camp sessions by month (e.g., July), daily schedule/hours (e.g., 9:00 AM–3:00 PM), and maximum weekly fee (e.g., under $150)
Apply multiple filters together and update the list of available camps
Display key details for each camp session in card format (dates, hours, cost, grade ranges, brief description)
Open detailed camp pages for specific sessions to learn more and submit interest forms

incoming_params.description: Optional month enum such as "july" to pre-select in filters
Optional daily schedule identifier such as "9_00_am_3_00_pm"
Optional maximum weekly fee, e.g., 150
Optional sort key such as "start_date_asc"

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a camp session card

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Programs"
Footer link labeled "Summer Camps"
URL parameters can pre-populate month, schedule, and fee filters

pages.name: Summer Camp Detail
pages.description: Detailed information and interest form for a specific summer camp session. Shows schedule, cost, activities, and allows parents to submit an interest request.
primary_functions: Show full details for a selected camp session (dates, daily schedule, cost, activities, eligible grades)
Provide a "Register Interest" or "Request Info" form for parents to complete
Collect key information such as child’s name, upcoming grade, parent/guardian name, phone number, and preferred session week
Submit the interest form and confirm that the request has been sent for the selected qualifying camp

incoming_params.description: SummerCampSession.id identifying which camp session to display

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Summer Camps"

access_methods.description: Accessed via a camp card link containing ?campSessionId=...
Interest form submission handled on this page via submitCampInterestForm

header_links.description: Access lunch menus and family-focused resources
View homework and grading policies by grade
Explore summer camps and other special programs
Find bus routes, stops, and times
See the school calendar of events
Learn about and contact school staff
View your saved school supply checklist

footer_links.description: View contact information and profiles for school staff
Access bus route maps and schedules
Review homework time guidelines and grading policies
Learn about after-school clubs and activities
See school lunch menus and dietary options
Check upcoming school events and important dates
